creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm sorry for letting this sit so long. 

I don't see that we use that SCSL source anywhere in a port at this time. 
I also checked the openjdk6 and openjdk7 ports and it looks like they have 
these or similar changes in them.  On that basis I'm closing this PR.
